options.description: Optional mount options understood by the backend runtime.

source.description: Absolute host path to mount into the daemon container.

target.description: Absolute container path where the source is mounted.

mounts.description: Host mounts exposed to the daemon container.

networkMode.description: Network mode. Supported values are `host` and `appnet`.

pidNamespace.description: Process namespace mode. Supported values are `host` and `private`.

privileged.description: Run the daemon container with elevated host capabilities.

user.description: Runtime user, as a numeric uid or uid:gid string.
